zh-tw.title: 考試語錄大集合
zh-tw.description: 從會考、學測到分科測驗，每一個熬夜畫重點的考生都懂的崩潰自嘲，廢文文學考場版

en.title: Exam Mood Quotes
en.description: For everyone who has stared at a question paper longer than at their crush — relatable lines for exam season survivors

items.sourceNote: Dcard 考試板 自嘲常見句式 — 想交卷 register

zh-tw.content:
監考老師：「還有十分鐘。」
我：「沒事，我比答案紙更想交卷。」
zh-tw.editorNote: 考完隨手 po Threads 或考前發限動的標準句型，朋友秒按愛心。
variations: 進階版：「還有十分鐘」→「來得及把名字再寫一次。」
也能換成：「還有十分鐘，但我心已經離開考場二十分鐘了。」

en.content:
Proctor: "Ten minutes left."
Me: "That's fine, I wanted to leave forty minutes ago."
en.editorNote: Drop this on Threads right after walking out of the exam — group chat will reply with crying-laughing reacts.
variations: Heavier version: "Ten minutes left" — "Just enough time to rewrite my name in cursive."

items.sourceNote: PTT 高中板 夜讀感嘆 register — 三千頁 vs 三秒鐘 對照

zh-tw.content:
夜讀三千頁，進考場三秒鐘忘光。
果然書讀進腦袋的方法，跟記憶離開腦袋的方法是同一條路。
zh-tw.editorNote: 考前一夜的 IG 限動專用，配個哭著翻課本的照片更有戲。
variations: 也可以說：「我背了一整年，考卷只用了一秒鐘證明它白費了。」

en.content:
Stayed up reading three thousand pages. Forgot all of it in three seconds at the exam hall.
Turns out the road in and the road out are the same road.
en.editorNote: Caption it under a pic of your textbook stack — instant relatable post for finals week.
variations: Shorter take: "My brain has excellent in-and-out service. Drive-thru memory."

items.sourceNote: Dcard 重考板 應屆 vs 重考 對照句型

zh-tw.content:
應屆生：今年好難。
重考生：每年都這樣。
在重考的應屆生：所以我現在到底算誰？
zh-tw.editorNote: 重考生群組必傳，下面留言一定排成一條長長的⋯⋯接龍。
variations: 再加一行：「在重考又考差的應屆生：請把我從這個句型移除。」

en.content:
First-timer: "This year is so hard."
Resit student: "Every year is like this."
Resit student who's still failing: "So which one am I supposed to be?"
en.editorNote: Drop in your study group chat — silence, then a wave of "why are you calling me out" memes.
variations: Extension: "Resit student resitting the resit: please remove me from this comparison."

items.sourceNote: 考試焦慮療癒 register — 答錯也沒關係 frame

zh-tw.content:
答錯也沒關係。
反正人生有更多題目，本來就沒有答案。
zh-tw.editorNote: 考完安慰朋友的標配句，不會說「沒關係」就用這句，比較有層次。
variations: 可以延伸：「人生這張考卷，我寫到一半才發現它根本沒有解答本。」

en.content:
It's okay if you got the answer wrong.
Life has way more questions, and most of them never had a right answer to begin with.
en.editorNote: The grown-up version of "don't worry about it" — send it to a friend who's spiraling after the test.
variations: Add: "Turns out life's exam doesn't come with an answer key — just vibes."

items.sourceNote: Dcard 學測 考完那一刻 register — 比放榜還像放榜

zh-tw.content:
考完最後一科走出考場那一刻，
比放榜還像放榜。
至於上不上榜，那是下一個我要煩惱的事。
zh-tw.editorNote: 考最後一科出來那種「終於是個人」的瞬間，配張陽光照超有畫面。
variations: 也能寫成：「走出考場 = 出獄；放榜 = 判刑。中間那段叫做暫時自由。」

en.content:
Walking out of the last exam feels more like results day than results day itself.
Whether I passed is a problem for future me.
en.editorNote: Post this with a photo of the empty exam hall behind you — the universal end-of-finals mood.
variations: Try: "Leaving the exam = parole. Results day = sentencing. Everything in between is borrowed freedom."

items.sourceNote: 國中會考 5/16-17 register — 銜接班 frame

zh-tw.content:
會考完那天我以為自由了。
後來才發現，自由的後面還有：
暑期銜接班、新生先修班、英文加強班、數學重點班。
原來會考只是大門，後面還有一整排門。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合國中會考完的孩子貼在限動，爸媽看了會心虛地默默關掉視窗。
variations: 可以縮短成：「會考結束 ≠ 暑假開始，只是換了一個教室。」

en.content:
After the big exam I thought I was free.
Then came summer prep, pre-orientation prep, English boot camp, and math review camp.
The exam wasn't a door. It was the first of many doors.
en.editorNote: For middle schoolers who just learned that summer is also a curriculum.
variations: Shorter: "Exam over ≠ summer starts. Just a different classroom."

items.sourceNote: 考試範圍對照 register — 背的 vs 考的 frame

zh-tw.content:
我背的範圍跟考的範圍，像兩個會考。
它們可能曾經認識過，但是從來沒見過面。
zh-tw.editorNote: 看到考卷瞬間想哭時的內心 OS，傳給同學笑著哭一波。
variations: 進階：「老師說考試範圍是這幾課，命題老師說：『沒寫死，那就都算。』」

en.content:
What I studied and what showed up on the test feel like two different exams.
They may have heard about each other once. They have never met.
en.editorNote: The face-down moment of every test ever — share it after, not before.
variations: Add: "Teacher said the scope was chapters 1–5. Test setter said 'unspecified means everything.'"

items.sourceNote: 考前夜 register — 早點睡 vs 滑手機 對照

zh-tw.content:
考試前一晚，我媽說：「早點睡。」
我說：「好。」
然後我滑了四個小時的手機。
睡前的我和起床的我，是兩個從未合作的陌生人。
zh-tw.editorNote: 考前一夜共鳴感 100％，配一張凌晨三點的天花板就完美了。
variations: 可以加：「醒來那一刻，我恨他比恨考試還多。」

en.content:
Night before the exam, mom said: "Sleep early."
I said: "Sure."
Then scrolled my phone for four hours.
Night-me and morning-me are two strangers who refuse to cooperate.
en.editorNote: The universal ceiling-staring confession — pair it with a 3am photo for full effect.
variations: Add: "Morning me hates night me more than the exam itself."

items.sourceNote: 國文考懷疑人生 register — funtexthub 廢文化主場

zh-tw.content:
明明考的是國文，
為什麼考完之後，我懷疑的不是答案，是我自己的人生。
zh-tw.editorNote: 考完國文那種「我到底有沒有讀過書」的精神損傷感，傳給班群效果最佳。
variations: 也能改：「考的是國文，崩潰的是國語、英文、人生這三題我都不會。」

en.content:
It was a Chinese exam.
But after walking out, the thing I doubt isn't my answers — it's my entire life.
en.editorNote: For the post-language-test existential crisis. Drop it in the group chat with no follow-up.
variations: Try: "Came in to take a language test. Left questioning my fluency in being alive."

items.sourceNote: Software update 比喻 — 國際英文流行 frame

zh-tw.content:
考試就像軟體更新。
不方便、突然出現、無法跳過，
而且每次更新完都覺得自己變更慢。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合理工腦或工程師朋友群組，懂科技梗的會多按一個讚。
variations: 延伸：「重考 = 重灌；模擬考 = 內測；正式考 = 上線。」

en.content:
Exams are like software updates.
Inconvenient, sudden, impossible to skip,
and somehow you feel slower every time it finishes.
en.editorNote: Tech-brain humor — perfect for engineer friends or anyone who's clicked 'remind me later' too many times.
variations: Add: "Resit = reinstall. Mock = beta. Real exam = production."

items.sourceNote: 臨時抱佛腳 register — 廢文文學版

zh-tw.content:
我不是不讀書，
我只是把整個學期的進度，
壓縮在考前那一個晚上的咖啡裡。
zh-tw.editorNote: 可以拿來幫熬夜的自己平反，配一杯第三杯黑咖啡的照片正好。
variations: 再加：「咖啡是液體的進度條，喝越多代表離崩潰越近。」

en.content:
I'm not avoiding studying.
I'm just compressing one whole semester
into a single cup of coffee the night before.
en.editorNote: Pair with a photo of your third coffee — universal cram-night content.
variations: Add: "Coffee is a liquid progress bar. Each refill = one step closer to collapse."

items.sourceNote: 考場心境 五階段 register — 對照式廢文

zh-tw.content:
進考場前：我會。
看到題目：我有看過。
寫一半：我以為我會。
寫完：我會什麼？
出考場：我是誰，我在哪。
zh-tw.editorNote: 五階段心境對照，傳到班群一秒引發共鳴接龍。
variations: 可加：「對答案：我下輩子再會。」

en.content:
Before the exam: I know this.
Reading the question: I've seen this.
Mid-answer: I thought I knew this.
Finished: What did I know?
Leaving the hall: Who am I and where is this.
en.editorNote: The five stages of exam grief — drop in the group chat for instant chaos.
variations: Add: "Checking the answer key: see you in the next life."

items.sourceNote: 作文寫不完 register — 學測常見梗

zh-tw.content:
作文題目給的時間是五十分鐘。
我前四十分鐘在想開頭。
後十分鐘把人生濃縮成三段。
結論：我的人生大概也是這樣寫出來的。
zh-tw.editorNote: 寫作文的痛大家都懂，這句配上凌亂的考卷照超有共感。
variations: 也能說：「作文最後一段叫做『綜上所述』，意思是『時間到了我亂寫』。」

en.content:
We had fifty minutes for the essay.
I spent forty thinking of an opening line.
I compressed my entire worldview into the last ten.
Maybe that's how I built my actual life too.
en.editorNote: Essay panic = life panic. Universal feeling, very postable.
variations: Add: "My conclusion paragraph is just 'in summary' — translation: I ran out of time."

items.sourceNote: 對答案後悔 register — 不對答案 自我保護 frame

zh-tw.content:
考完最重要的事不是檢討，是別對答案。
保留那段「我以為我考得不錯」的時光，
是考試送給每個考生最後的溫柔。
zh-tw.editorNote: 考完想衝去對答案的朋友傳這句，救他一晚的心情。
variations: 再加：「成績單會自己來找你，不用主動上前迎接。」

en.content:
After the exam, the most important thing isn't reviewing — it's not checking the answers.
The "I think I did okay" hour
is the last bit of mercy the exam ever gives you.
en.editorNote: For the friend who wants to compare answers the second they leave the hall — save them one peaceful evening.
variations: Add: "The results will find you. You don't need to walk toward them."

items.sourceNote: 拖延證書化 register — 黑帶 procrastination 梗在地化

zh-tw.content:
別人拿的是書卷獎，
我拿的是拖延界的終身成就獎。
而且這個獎我從國小就開始累積點數了。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合自我介紹寫不出長處時拿來救場，配個歪嘴笑的自拍剛剛好。
variations: 也可以說：「我不是不努力，我是把努力延後到最後一刻才一次用完。」
進階版：「拖延是我唯一不會拖延的事。」

en.content:
Other people collect honor roll certificates.
I'm collecting points toward a lifetime achievement award in procrastination.
I've been building this résumé since elementary school.
en.editorNote: Drop this when someone asks about your strengths and you've got nothing — half-smile selfie pairs well.
variations: Try: "I'm not lazy. I'm just saving all my effort for the last possible second."
Heavier: "Procrastinating is the only thing I never procrastinate on."

items.sourceNote: 會考 5/16-17 倒數 register — 父母 vs 考生 視角差 frame

zh-tw.content:
媽媽問：「你緊張嗎？」
我說：「還好。」
其實我已經把每一科可能考砸的劇本，
在腦袋裡重播了三百遍。
所以我不是不緊張，我是已經緊張到習慣了。
zh-tw.editorNote: 會考前一週的限動神句，發出去媽媽會看到，但她假裝沒看到。
variations: 也可以縮短：「我說『還好』的意思是『我已經崩潰過很多次了』。」

en.content:
Mom asked: "Are you nervous?"
I said: "Not really."
Meanwhile I've replayed every possible disaster scenario
three hundred times in my head.
I'm not un-nervous. I'm just used to being nervous.
en.editorNote: Story-post material for the week before finals — your mom will see it and pretend she didn't.
variations: Shorter: "'Not really' is just code for 'I've already had ten breakdowns about it.'"

items.sourceNote: 考前許願 register — 拜拜 vs 讀書 對照

zh-tw.content:
考前一週，我去文昌廟拜了三次。
讀書時間總共三小時。
所以我準備考試的策略是：
把希望外包，把焦慮自留。
zh-tw.editorNote: 拜文昌的考生都懂，配個廟裡蔥跟芹菜的照片更應景。
variations: 可以加：「我求的不是高分，是命題老師今天心情好。」
也能改：「神明保佑沒讀書的人，是這個世界最後的浪漫。」

en.content:
The week before the exam I visited the temple three times.
Total study hours: three.
My exam prep strategy is basically:
outsource the hope, keep the anxiety.
en.editorNote: Universal pre-exam superstition humor — works for any culture's version of lucky charms.
variations: Add: "I'm not praying for a high score. I'm praying the test setter is in a good mood."
Try: "The gods protecting students who didn't study is the last romance left in this world."

items.sourceNote: 考生 vs 同學 群組 register — 假裝沒讀 frame

zh-tw.content:
班群裡每個人都說：「我都沒讀。」
結果考完每個人的分數都比我高。
原來「沒讀」是同學之間的暗號，
意思是「我讀超多但不想讓你以為我很拼」。
zh-tw.editorNote: 全台灣班群共同的潛規則，傳出去保證有同學跳出來說「不是啦我真的沒讀」。
variations: 進階：「下次有人說沒讀，我會直接回他：『沒讀的話請你連同情都不要給我。』」

en.content:
Everyone in the group chat said: "I didn't study at all."
Then they all scored higher than me.
Turns out "didn't study" is a secret classmate code for
"studied way too much but didn't want to look try-hard."
en.editorNote: Universal group-chat law of physics — post and watch a classmate jump in to insist they really didn't study.
variations: Add: "Next time someone says they didn't study, I'm telling them to keep their pity too."

items.sourceNote: AI 世代讀書 register — ChatGPT 幫不了考場 frame

zh-tw.content:
整個學期都是 AI 幫我寫作業。
進考場的那一刻才發現，
它不能進來，它的記憶卡也帶不進來。
我和它的合作，到此正式告吹。
zh-tw.editorNote: 2026 AI 世代考生的內心 OS，配個沒收手機通知圖正中紅心。
variations: 可以加：「平常 AI 幫我，今天我幫 AI 求個分數。」
另一版：「我和 ChatGPT 的友情，止步於考場大門。」

en.content:
All semester my AI did the homework.
Then I walked into the exam hall and realized —
it can't come in, and neither can its memory.
Our partnership officially ends at the door.
en.editorNote: Peak 2026 student energy — pair with a screenshot of the phone-collection notice.
variations: Add: "All year the AI carried me. Today I'm the one praying for it."
Try: "My friendship with ChatGPT ends at the exam hall door."

items.sourceNote: 115 會考 5/16-17 倒數五天 register — 時間錯覺 frame

zh-tw.content:
倒數五天的時候我覺得還有五天。
倒數三天的時候我覺得還有三天。
倒數一天的時候我覺得：
「咦，那五天三天那幾天我到底做了什麼？」
zh-tw.editorNote: 115 會考前一週的標準內心戲，發出來同學會集體沉默點愛心。
variations: 可以縮短：「倒數歸倒數，我的進度是倒著數的。」
也能寫成：「時間沒有變少，是我把它丟到別的地方去了。」

en.content:
Five days out I thought I had five days.
Three days out I thought I had three.
One day out I thought:
"Wait, what did I actually do on those five and three days?"
en.editorNote: Universal countdown-week brain — post it and watch classmates quietly heart it.
variations: Shorter: "The countdown went down. My progress went sideways."
Add: "Time didn't disappear. I just left it somewhere else."

items.sourceNote: 考前讀書計畫 register — 計畫 vs 實際 對照

zh-tw.content:
我做了一個完美的讀書計畫。
計畫上：每天三小時，分科進度滿滿。
實際上：第一天讀計畫表，第二天修計畫表，第三天哀悼計畫表。
計畫表本身就是我最熟的科目。
zh-tw.editorNote: 考生們做完計畫表就以為自己讀完書了，這句一發班群秒被截圖。
variations: 進階：「我背得最熟的不是課文，是我自己訂的進度表。」

en.content:
I made the perfect study plan.
On paper: three hours a day, every subject covered.
In reality: day one I read the plan, day two I edited the plan, day three I held a funeral for the plan.
The study plan is the subject I know best.
en.editorNote: Post-mortem for every study schedule ever — instant relate for the planner-aesthetic crowd.
variations: Add: "The thing I memorized best wasn't a textbook. It was my own schedule."

items.sourceNote: 考完放空 register — 大腦關機 frame

zh-tw.content:
考完那天我躺在床上發呆三小時。
不是在休息，是大腦真的關機了。
它說：「我已經把一整年的能量在剛剛那兩小時花光，請等下次補貨。」
zh-tw.editorNote: 考完那種「人還在但靈魂去山上閉關」的狀態，配張天花板照超神還原。
variations: 也能說：「考完不是放假，是我在自動重灌系統。」

en.content:
After the exam I stared at the ceiling for three hours.
Not resting — my brain literally shut down.
It said: "I spent a year's worth of energy in those two hours. Please wait for restock."
en.editorNote: The post-exam vegetative state we all know — caption a ceiling pic and you're set.
variations: Add: "It's not a break. My system is reinstalling itself."

items.sourceNote: 成績單 vs 自我認知 register — 真實落差 frame

zh-tw.content:
我以為的我：認真讀書、規律生活、預計穩穩過。
成績單裡的我：好像跟那個我完全不認識。
看來我認識的那個我，從來沒去過考場。
zh-tw.editorNote: 放榜當天的高共鳴句，配張看到成績單瞬間表情的迷因剛剛好。
variations: 再加：「我跟成績單上的那個人，今天才正式見面。」
也能說：「我以為的我，住在我的計畫表裡，不在考場。」

en.content:
Me in my head: studied hard, balanced life, easy pass.
Me on the score report: a complete stranger.
Apparently the me I knew never actually showed up to the exam.
en.editorNote: Results-day mood — pair with a side-eye meme for full effect.
variations: Add: "Me and the person on this score report finally meet today."
Try: "The me I imagined lives in my planner, not the exam hall."

items.sourceNote: 考試象形文字 register — 看不懂題目 frame 在地化

zh-tw.content:
翻開考卷的那一刻，
我以為自己誤拿到了甲骨文期中考。
每個字我都認識，組合起來像是來自另一個朝代的密語。
zh-tw.editorNote: 拿到考卷瞬間的眼神死，配張一臉茫然的考生迷因效果最強。
variations: 可以換成：「題目我都看得懂，意思我都看不懂。」
進階：「這張考卷不是中文，是中文的鄉音版。」

en.content:
The moment I opened the paper,
I thought I'd picked up a hieroglyphics midterm by mistake.
I knew every word — together they read like a code from another dynasty.
en.editorNote: Universal 'what is this question even asking' face — pair with a confused-blink meme.
variations: Try: "I understand each word. I don't understand the sentence."
Add: "This isn't a test. It's a treasure map without the X."

items.sourceNote: 115 會考 5/16-17 倒數三天 register — 松鼠埋核桃 比喻在地化

zh-tw.content:
考前複習，像松鼠在找牠去年埋的核桃。
我知道我讀過，
我也知道它就在腦袋裡某個角落，
可是它在哪、長什麼樣子、我完全沒印象。
zh-tw.editorNote: 115 會考前三天的內心戲，配張翻書翻到爛的桌面照超寫實。
variations: 可以加：「最後我選擇相信考場的氣氛會幫我把它挖出來。」
也能寫成：「我背過，只是它跟我玩躲貓貓。」

en.content:
Cramming before an exam is like being a squirrel hunting for nuts it buried last winter.
I know I studied it.
I know it's somewhere in my brain.
I have no idea where, what shape, or whether it's still alive.
en.editorNote: Peak countdown-week mood — works for any finals, any country, any species.
variations: Add: "I'm trusting the vibes in the exam hall to dig it up for me."
Try: "I memorized it. It's just playing hide and seek."

items.sourceNote: 考試恐懼動力學 register — 純恐懼驅動 frame

zh-tw.content:
我的讀書動力來源不是夢想，
是「再不讀就完蛋了」的純粹恐懼。
所以我不是在進步，我是在逃命。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合考前一晚邊抖邊讀書的限動文案，留言區會出現「我也是」的接龍。
variations: 也能說：「夢想推不動我，恐懼可以。所以我每天都在被恐懼追著跑。」
進階：「努力 = 害怕的具象化。」

en.content:
My motivation isn't dreams or goals.
It's pure fear of what happens if I don't open this book.
So I'm not making progress — I'm running for my life.
en.editorNote: The honest version of every motivational poster — drop it the night before a final.
variations: Add: "Dreams can't move me. Fear can. So I spend my days outrunning fear."
Try: "Effort is just fear with better posture."

items.sourceNote: 考試 = 期末關卡 register — 遊戲化比喻 frame

zh-tw.content:
考試就像遊戲的最終魔王戰。
差別是：遊戲打輸可以讀檔，
考試打輸要等下一年改版重練。
而且裝備不能繼承，技能要重點，連角色都會老一歲。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合愛打電動的考生群組，傳出去同學會回「我已經 NG 兩次了」。
variations: 可以加：「補習班是付費攻略本，老師是 NPC，命題老師是隱藏 boss。」
也能寫成：「考試的存檔點只有一個，就是放榜那天。」

en.content:
Exams are basically the final boss fight.
Difference: in a game you can reload your save.
If you lose the exam, you wait a whole year for the next patch, your gear doesn't carry over, your skill tree resets, and your character ages one year.
Worst respawn system ever designed.
en.editorNote: Gamer-brain humor — perfect for the group chat where everyone speed-runs studying.
variations: Add: "Cram school is the paid strategy guide. Teachers are NPCs. The test setter is the hidden boss."
Try: "The only save point is results day."
